extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates proceedings by direction and category: I counted only the “Against” rows, namely criminal proceedings against the Bank, Promoter, Directors and Group Company (all Nil), regulatory/statutory actions against the Promoter (Nil) and Directors (2), and tax matters against the Bank (5); I excluded all “By” rows and did not count promoter/director tax matters in the issuer-group tax count. The quantified aggregate against the Bank and its subsidiaries is based on the stated components of ₹18.92 million civil litigation plus ₹30.61 million tax matters against the Bank, totaling ₹49.53 million, or ₹4.953 crore; promoter and director amounts were excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated Total of ₹40.14 million as of June 30, 2021, converted to ₹4.014 crore, rather than a re-sum. The only concentration percentages disclosed are segment/geographic figures (and fees and commissions as a percentage of total income), not company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue percentages for a full fiscal year. The litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million; conversion is ₹1 million = ₹0.1 crore.
